title: Sunday Punch
writer: Fay Kanin, Michael Kanin, Allen Rivkin
actors: William Lundigan, Jean Rogers, Dan Dailey
plot: Ma Galestrum's boarding house for aspiring boxers is disrupted when her niece Judy moves in. Ken Burke and Olaf Jensen, housemates and rivals, both vie for Judy's affection, leading to a climactic boxing match between the two frie...
